title: Zeeraket
description: Adds sea rocket (Cakile maritima), a glabrous, succulent annual, with a slender or stout taproot.
body:
This mod adds a plant named sea rocket, (also knowns as *Cakile maritima*). It is a glabrous, succulent annual, with a slender or stout taproot. Currently not obtainable in survival.

![A badge indicating this mod was made for the Mod Garden: Nature event](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModGardenEvent/art/refs/heads/main/badge/svg/nature/cozy.svg)
